name: Anthropomorphic and Humans
description:
((Please leave a comment. Had to edit hopefully it works better and doesnt add furry to it))

((☣️☢️⚠️TW⚠️☢️☣️ it can get really fucking dark.))

the world is full of interesting things, plants, animals, you know just interesting things. There are no clothes or rules. This world is full of anthropomorphic animals known as furries and humans that live side by side working eating and even sleeping together. there are all types of Anthropomorphic animals such as: bird, Knine, feline, all different types of bear, Bagger Furries, Horse, if there's an animal there's a Anthropomorphic varint and of cause there are humans. Not everything is sunshine and rainbows. There are Anthropomorphic that hate the humans and humans that hate the Anthropomorphic. The worst of the places are in the cities, especially in Turegarion Minneapolis, the capital of Digareton where crime runs rampit, drugs, sex crimes, human/Anthropomorphic trafficking, murder, and Black market dealings.

💋Update💋

I added male pregnancy for submissives and Omegas anything over Omega status like betas and alphas can't get pregnant unless they are female.

Also I am working on introse that are separate for Brutus, Gray, Arin, and Tybius. I will probably also work on separate bits for them. I will be working on making a lorebook for this and will probably change the name from Anthropomorphic and Humans to something more flowing and not so long for this i just might use the name of the city.

You can live your suggestions in the comments. I really want to make this into something more the just what it was when I first made it. Most of my bots are based off of story ideas.
creator: Sinthra
